title: INC-207: No images in test report for thread yCmxs
error_message: Report for thread yCmxs shows no images. test_logs array truncated to steps 0-2, missing 151 steps including healing screenshots.

details.stack_trace: test_logs array contains only steps 0-2; steps 3-154 absent from report JSON. Healing screenshots in healing.screens not rendered by UI.
details.root_cause_analysis: Step 18 LLM tapped container cell (element 8) instead of text input, navigating to wrong screen. No command_verifier to catch error. Step 19 failed (UNDOABLE). Healing session EXEC_FAILED. Report generation pipeline truncated test_logs.
suggested_fixes: Fix test_logs truncation in report generation pipeline
Surface healing screenshots in report UI
Add command_verifier to search field tap steps
Improve LLM element selection for search fields
